text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha! Happy birthday, me!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
...What should I do? Maybe it's better if I don't give this
to her...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Why, if it isn't Doto! What's the matter? Did the
sight of my majestic figure stop you in your
tracks?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, many thanks! Oh, could what you're holding
be...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A present for my magnificent self? Rejoice, for I
shall graciously accept your gift!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Um, th-that's right! I-I thought you might like
them, so I got you some bath bombs with dried
flowers in them...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But on second thought... a present from someone
clumsy like me probably smells bad... or who
knows, it might even explode!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I just know it'll be more trouble to you than it's
worth. So, um... if you could pretend you didn't
see anything...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! You have nothing to fear, my dear
Doto!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
No peril, however dire, can faze me! An explosion
is but a caressing breeze—so rest assured that
your present will be in good hands!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-Opera O, you really mean it?!
